Our features include:

Real-time metrics on your Account Receivable collection
Automated and personalized workflows
Payment portals adapted to each customer

name: Toshl
description: Developer of a personal finance manager and bank data aggregator application designed to get personal finance past spreadsheets and graphs. The company's budgeting application tracks and manages a person's daily expenses, as well as organizes their bills and budget, enabling individuals to find out where their money is going and how to keep their finances in shape with the help of infographics.

name: Trace
description: Developer of a financial management platform designed to improve the financial health of businesses. The company's platform provides collaborative workflows and analytics for companies to better manage financial services like budgeting, spending, and hiring, enabling finance teams to get real-time spend visibility, close their books in less time and empower their employees while reducing risk.

name: Automotop
description: Operator of a truck dealership platform based in Jakarta, Indonesia. The company's platform helps to facilitate buying and selling of trucks online, enabling clients to support their transportation business.

name: Trusted Insight
description: Operator of an online investment network designed to get insights into alternative assets. The company's network of investment professionals narrows the gap between the digital and real world with relevant alternative asset news and peer insights, enabling readers to keep up with the latest investment trends efficiently.

name: Ubuntu
description: Developer of Gold International Fungible Token (G.I.F.T.) platform intended to offer an ecosystem of digital investment backed by real assets. The company's investment platform, combined with dynamic social commerce functionalities is a digital certificate of gold ownership 100% backed by physical gold and pegged to the international spot price of gold, providing users with financial freedom and interconnected humanity.

name: UNest
description: Developer of a digital investing platform designed to help parents to save and grow the money needed to fund their children's education.

name: Unisub LLC
description: Developer of recurring crypto payment platform designed to allow people to avail subscriptions through crypto. The company's platform integrates crypto subscriptions, that make payments automatic, so customers don't have to make a payment or manually enter their payment information, enabling businesses to accept recurring crypto payments.

name: &Volume
description: &Volume is the AI driven risk-management infrastructure for digital assets — one layer to monitor risk, spot opportunity, and move capital.

name: Win-Win
description: Developer of a sports gaming platform intended to help raise funds for charitable trusts while supporting fantasy football tournaments. The company's technology has a ticketing application for users to buy tickets for fantasy sports, raise funds, and choose and pitch for their favorite athletes, enabling sports lovers to support sports for social good.

name: Yo Fio
description: Developer of microcredit application designed for purchases at informal corner stores. The company's application scans QR codes to show the details of the products being bought and authorizes the purchase by notifying the store and provides credit facilities to corner stores through the app and in partnership with the store gives credit lines to the store customers, enabling customers to buy today and pay in a month.

name: YourPay
description: Developer of a mobile banking platform intended to empower and transform the financial lives of customers. The company's platform helps to provide savings accounts, productive loans, consumer loans, low-interest rates and prepaid cards with no fees, enabling users to easily manage their money through their mobile.

name: ZaynFi
description: Zayn Network is a cutting-edge modular Layer 2 ZK Sovereign Rollup uniting Bitcoin and Ethereum's strengths, offering trustless interoperability and optimized efficiency, scalability, and security, while targeting $2.8T RWA opportunities in MENAP and Southeast Asia, supported by prominent investors like 500 Global and Cur8 Capital.

name: Kalki, Zebec, Kalkire
description: Developer of a financial platform designed to transform payroll transactions. The company's platform uses decentralized finance (Defi) technology to perform real-time and continuous streams of payments with the support of blockchain technology, enabling users to stream their payroll money to compliant cryptocurrency and convert it into real cash.

name: Ziro
description: Operator of credit business payments marketplace intended to offer financial services to B2B, BNPL service, manufacturers, wholesalers, and B2B suppliers. The company's platform offers features like options to pay in installments, improve repurchase rates, check purchase history, and pre-approved credit limit, helping clients by offering flexible payment options so that they can improve their cash flow and grow their businesses.

name: Zolvers
description: Operator of an online platform intended to connect customers with service providers for errands. The company's marketplace helps people to outsource errands such as cleaning, home or office maintenance, and any short pending task, enabling people to complete housework at a reasonable cost.

name: Ztock
description: Operator of an investment application intended to invest in the capital markets. The company's platform offers to trade stocks and ETFs in the United States and the Philippines and also provides security for the funds and build portfolios, enabling financial institutions' data encryption and empowering the next generation of investors.

name: Rebaja Tus Cuentas
description: Developer of a mortgage purchase software designed to provide financial advisory services for mortgage debts. The company's software provides a form for basic information about the current mortgage credit, helps in finding good bidders with the financial institution to close the terms of the transfer of the mortgage, enabling users to avail mortgage debt purchase without any hassle.

name: Yaydoo
description: Provider of an office management platform designed to connect online retailers with customers. The company's digital concierge marketplace application uses chat bots and personalized interaction tools to manage expenses and accounting, simplify purchase decision and more, enabling customers to find and buy products from online retailers based their individual demand.

name: Revivn
description: Provider of electronic recycling services designed to re-purpose unused hardware to under-served communities. The company's electronic recycling services include collecting excess hardware from organizational sites and re-purposing them for communities in need by providing a detailed hardware inventory and certifying data destruction and ethical recycling, enabling organizations to re-purpose their unused technical gadgets and hardware for a greater cause.

name: Melltoo
description: TAKADAO offers a platform for halal takaful powered by the blockchain, creating an insurance alternative for the new, global age. For the first time, this allows Muslims from all over the world to access value aligned, transparent insurance at a never-before-possible scale.

name: Bstow
description: Developer of a micro-donation application. The company develops an application which rounds-up any transactions made by the user and automatically donates the money to a pre-selected charity.

name: Paynas
description: Developer of a payroll enrollment platform designed to provide banking services and benefits to small-sized companies and their employees. The company's platform provides multiple HR features such as employee and payroll management, recruitment management, task management, attendance management with a time logging track system, enabling clients to provide its employees hassle-free banking, HR management, and employee benefits in one place, and in a single workflow.

name: HandUp
description: Provider of a crowdfunding platform designed to raise money for homeless people. The company's crowdfunding platform connects the abundance of resources and support in the society with the capabilities of existing social service nonprofit and government organizations and helps people who are in need to become a member of the community where donors can directly contribute to these members, enabling nonprofits and donors in the community with a new, simple and direct way to make an impact on poverty.

name: Finsify
description: Cross platform solution that helps people simply manage personal finances by consolidating all accounts such as bank and cash in one place.

name: Paraşüt
description: Devloper of a cloud-based financial software designed to offer invoice management services. The company's software offers bookkeeping tools to small and medium-sized businesses, featuring e-invoicing, e-billing, as well as online revenue and expenditure tracking system, enabling clients to save time and human resource.

name: Omise
description: Operator of full-featured payment management platform designed to connect millions of customers across the world. The company's payment management platform is easy to setup and works seamlessly across multiple devices, providing fraud detection, data privacy and highly secured transactions, enabling users to manage their funds whenever they want.

name: YayPay
description: Developer of a SaaS-based predictive AR workflow software designed to accelerate cash flow and automate accounts receivables. The company's predictive AR workflow software is a finance workflow software that automates payment work flows for invoice collection process, leverages data and automatic payment communications, through big data and machine learning algorithms in order to measures credit risk and historical payment behavior of debtors, enabling back-office finance teams to accelerate collections, improve customer relationships and predict cash flow.

name: Bankiom
description: Developer of a financial platform dedicated to providing a hassle-free banking experience. The company's platform offers digital banking and money management services, loan approvals as well as unparalleled customer support, enabling customers to organize their finances in a simplified manner.

name: Payment24
description: Provider of a fuel payment and fleet management system created for fleet management. The company's fleet management system integrates into gas stations and vehicles, enabling fleet owners and managers to reduce fraud and increase efficiencies.

name: Gluwa
description: Gluwa is a builder of Gluwa, Creditcoin, and a stealth protocol. Gluwa connects DeFi investors to TradFi investment opportunities. Creditcoin is an interoperable credit network that powers Gluwa. The stealth protocol provides trustless proof-of-location, which enhances the security and usability of Gluwa.

name: AutoChilango
description: Provider of legal and bureaucracy assistance for cars. The company engages in development of a mobile phone application that provides traffic alerts, insurance management and other vital information that helps people to manage everything that is necessary with having a car in Mexico City.

name: Fatora
description: All-in-one tool to go eCommerce and start selling

name: Modus
description: Provider of an escrow platform intended to make closure of home less painful for people. The company's platform combines with revolutionary technology to bring seamless experience throughout the process which are offered online to save time, enabling real estate clients to outsource manual data entry associated with home closings in a hassle free way and avoid the delay in proceedings.

name: MakeLeaps
description: Provider of a cloud-based invoicing platform designed to visualize the complete process from invoice date to expected due date. The company's platform allows users to create, print and send invoices and optionally include the company logo, enabling clients to increase their productivity.

name: Bankons
description: Powering a mobile offers service for banks to give users rewards via transaction history.

name: WeDidIt
description: Operator of a crowdfunding platform for non-profit organizations. The company enables non-profits to develop, launch and promote crowd funding campaigns.

name: Simple
description: Provider of banking services through Web and mobile applications. The company works in partnership with financial institutions that hold the actual deposits. It also offers deposit, money transfer and online bill payment services.

name: LittleFund
description: Developer of a mobile application designed for financial wellness of children. The company develops an application based smart savings and gift tool enabling parents to teach and enhance their child's financial skills.

name: InstaPaisa
description: InstaPaisa leverages Big Data, and machine learning algorithms to make automated lending decisions and originate loans online in India.

name: Cloudability
description: Provider of a financial management tool for monitoring and analyzing cloud expenses. The company's platform aggregates expenditures into accessible and comprehensive reports that identify and allocate cloud costs using the most accurate, precise data in real-time thus scale efficiently and confidently with enterprise-scale analysis and machine learning which empower teams to optimize and be agile while staying accountable recommendations via SMS and email.

name: Recurly
description: Provider of a subscription billing services platform designed to deliver recurring billing automation. The company's pay-as-you-go subscription billing platform Recurly, offers professional billing, customizable hosted billing pages, account management and helps companies to eliminate cost and complexity required to manage subscription billing operations enabling customers to properly account for their subscription revenue and close the books quickly and accurately each month.

name: Rize
description: Provider of a savings platform. The company's platform allows users to automate the saving process by the saving goals using behavioral science.

name: Emburse
description: Provider of an expense tracking and management platform. The company's platform helps in controlling business expenses by issuing virtual prepaid corporate debit cards that can either be used one time or are refillable.

name: Funderful
description: Provider of a Web-based alumni fundraising management platform created to help universities manage and grow their annual giving programs. The company's platform displays contributions in a series of real-time infographics, allowing everyone to instantly compare results enabling fundraising organizations to structure, follow, track and analyze the donations campaigns..

name: Plerk
description: Plerk is the only all-in-one employee benefits platform in Mexico.
